mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_order WHERE technician_id = #{techId} AND FROM_UNIXTIME(appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND status NOT IN (0, 7, 8, 9) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_order WHERE technician_id = #{techId} AND FROM_UNIXTIME(appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND status = 6 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_order WHERE technician_id = #{techId} AND FROM_UNIXTIME(appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND status != 0 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_order WHERE technician_id = #{techId} AND FROM_UNIXTIME(appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND status IN (7, 8, 9) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tech_income), 0) FROM cb_order WHERE technician_id = #{techId} AND FROM_UNIXTIME(appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND status = 6 AND tech_income IS NOT NULL AND deleted = 0

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.appoint_time AS appointTime, o.service_name AS serviceName, o.service_duration AS serviceDuration, o.status, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, COALESCE(o.tech_income, 0) AS techIncome, m.nickname AS memberNickname, m.avatar AS memberAvatar FROM cb_order o LEFT JOIN cb_member m ON m.id = o.member_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE o.technician_id = #{techId} AND FROM_UNIXTIME(o.appoint_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() AND o.status NOT IN (0, 8, 9) AND o.deleted = 0 ORDER BY o.appoint_time ASC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status

SELECT merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND merchant_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY merchant_id ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT technician_id AS technicianId, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND technician_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY technician_id ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%H') AS hour, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%m-%d') AS label, FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ymd, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY ymd, label ORDER BY ymd
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cb_order WHERE technician_id = #{techId} AND deleted = 0 AND status IN (1, 2, 3, 4)

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(*) AS orders FROM cb_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (5, 6) AND create_time >= #{from} AND create_time < #{to} GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
